titleStmt.title: SII 7.210: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer

No. 210. (A.R. No. 40 of 1901). ON A SLABAt the top is and the crescent and a cow with calf on the left. On another slab close to this, having similar carvings, there is a completely worn out inscription in characters of the same period.LEANING AGAINST THE SOUTH WALL OF THE INNER ENCLOSURE OF THE SAME BASTI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jī
yātrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti .
śrījayādbhudaya sālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1493 neya
This and the following lines begin with a circle.saṁda va¨rttamāna prajōtpattisaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha
8 yalu śrīmatu lōkadēviyarāda caUṭarū taṁma voḍahu
ṭṭidaru padumaladēviyarige puṁṇyā¨rththavāgi Āhāradānakke bi
ṭṭa kṣētrava barasikoṭṭa silāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare . mījāramāgaṇi
yoḷage marakaṭaveṁba staḷakoḷakētimareṁba bayalagadde 2 kke bittuva bījava
ri mū 12 A vakuḷa bāgilagadde 1 kke bījavari mu 5 hādatimareṁba gadda 1 kke bī
javari mu 3 pijatimaru gadde 1 ke bījavari mu 7 jālagadde 1 ke bījavari
muḍe 3 baḍagaṇataṭṭina gaddegaḷu Adakkuḷa catussīmeyoḷa
guḷa beṭinagaddegaḷige bījavari mū 6 Aṁtu bījavari mū 36 Adaro
ḷa teṁginamara 20 Aḍakemara 6 halasinamara 13 Idakoḷagēṇiyo
hodige Akkibaḷa 50 lekkada mūḍe 45 maiṁdaguḷiya Udugaḷeṁba ba
yalagadde 3 kkaṁ bittuva bījavari mūḍe 3 yidakuḷa beṭṭinagaddegaḷu bittuva
bījavari mūḍe 10 yidakuḷa halasinamara 4 yidakuḷa Aḍaketōṭasahavāgi
gēṇiya Akki baḷa 50 lekkada mūḍe 12 Aṁtu staḷa[E]rakaṁ Akkiya mūḍe 57 mū
ḍe gēṇistaḷavanu gurugaḷabastiya pāriśvanāthana saṁnidhiyali saṁgasamudā
yada muṁdiṭṭu Eṁṭumaṁdi seṭikāraru nālvaru Eḷamegaḷoḷagāda sama
stahalara vasamāḍi koṭeU . halaridu yīdha¨rmmada Akki marakaṭada guttina baha
Akki mūḍe 57 nu Ēḷaneya vārada lāhāradānava māḍūdeṁdu barasi
hākida silāśāśana yī staḷakke kāṇike haṇa bhaṁḍi bhata biṭibiḍāra yi
lla . yī dha¨r(ṁ)mmakke muṁde puttigeyalu bāḷuva Arasugaḷu Aḷu
pasalladu . Aḷupidare pāriśanātha caṁdranāthana pādake tappidavaru . nava
kōṭimunīśvarara pādakke tappidavaru . vāranāsiyali sahasrakapile
koṁda pāpakke hōhāru . śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
